title: alsinastrum brachyspermum
intro: Alsinastrum brachyspermum, also known as Pilocarpus brachyspermus, is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the family Rutaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the heart and improve cardiovascular health due to the presence of pilocarpine, a potent cardiac glycoside. The health benefits of Alsinastrum brachyspermum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve overall cardiovascular function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to treat a range of conditions, including hypertension and heart disease.
